feed.title: US.gov
feed.subtitle: Combined U.S. federal government feed: NSA, Department of War (Featured Stories, News, Advisories, News Releases), FBI, NOAA, the USAGov and GSA blogs, GSA news releases, and U.S. Army news.

entry.title: 621st Contingency Response Wing Responds to Accelerate Earthquake Disaster Relief in Venezuela
entry.content: The 621st Contingency Response Wing deployed a 110-airman contingency response element to Simón Bolívar International Airport in Maiquetía, Vargas, Venezuela, to work with local authorities and other disaster relief teams to safely expand the intake of humanitarian aid by air transport.

entry.title: Corps of Engineers Continues Critical Repairs to Bird Island Pier
entry.content: Corps of Engineers Continues Critical Repairs to Bird Island Pier

entry.title: America's 250th: Fireworks, Freedom & Festivities
entry.content: From explosive firework displays and vibrant parades to moving naturalization ceremonies, service members, military families and citizens united across the country to celebrate America's historic 250th anniversary. The national events commemorated 250 years since the signing of the Declaration of Independence in 1776.

entry.title: Launch Your Cyber Career: Department of War Cyber Apprenticeship Applications Now Live!
entry.content: The War Department Office of the Chief Information Officer launched applications for the cyber apprenticeship program on USAJOBS. The initiative represents a critical step in forging a new generation of elite cyber professionals.

entry.title: The 20th anniversary of the NOAA Marine Debris Program
entry.content: The 20th anniversary of the NOAA Marine Debris Program Public participants in NOAA’s Marine Debris Monitoring and Assessment Project sort debris items and record data at Nukoli’i Beach, Hawaii in June of 2024. (Image credit: Kauai Surfrider) July 6, 2026 Twenty years ago, the NOAA Marine Debris Program was established as the U.S. Government’s lead to reduce and prevent the adverse impacts of marine debris on our ocean and Great Lakes. Education 0 On

entry.title: Retired Submariner Commemorates Both Bicentennial, Semiquincentennial in Guam
entry.content: Fifty years after raising the national colors in Guam for America's bicentennial, retired Navy Cmdr. Allan Riggs returned to the island to commemorate the nation's 250th birthday alongside a new generation of submariners.

entry.title: Secretary of State Marco Rubio meets with Chilean Foreign Minister Francisco Pérez Mackenna
entry.content: Secretary of State Marco Rubio meets with Chilean Foreign Minister Francisco Pérez Mackenna

entry.title: Medal of Honor Monday: Army Sgt. Thomas Alexander Baker Jr.
entry.content: Army Pvt. Thomas Alexander Baker Jr. was an infantryman who served in the Pacific Theater during World War II. He was posthumously promoted to sergeant and awarded the Medal of Honor for his heroic actions during the Battle of Saipan.

entry.title: Director of the Army National Guard visits with Alaska Army Guard Soldiers
entry.content: Director of the Army National Guard visits with Alaska Army Guard Soldiers

entry.title: Zama Pulse June - July 2026 edition
entry.content: Zama Pulse June - July 2026 edition

entry.content: B-Roll: U.S., partner nation service members participate in RIMPAC bowling tournament

entry.title: Flag Officer Visit to the U.S. Navy Dive Tank Demonstration in Times Square
entry.content: Flag Officer Visit to the U.S. Navy Dive Tank Demonstration in Times Square

entry.title: GSA Finalizes $30M San Antonio Property Sale Five Years Ahead of Schedule, Making Way for New Spurs Arena
entry.content: GSA Finalizes $30M San Antonio Property Sale Five Years Ahead of Schedule, Making Way for New Spurs Arena

entry.title: Acting Secretary of the Navy Hung Cao Speaks at INR 250
entry.content: Acting Secretary of the Navy Hung Cao Speaks at INR 250

entry.title: Fort Knox Freedom Fest: A celebration 250 years in the making
entry.content: Fort Knox Freedom Fest: A celebration 250 years in the making

entry.title: President, Vice President Address Nation in Celebration of America's 250th Birthday
entry.content: President Donald J. Trump addressed the nation during a "Salute to America" celebration on the National Mall to commemorate America's 250th birthday, while Vice President JD Vance made public comments in New York City earlier in the day.

entry.title: Signers of the Declaration of Independence: Pennsylvania
entry.content: From a self-taught surveyor to a pioneering physician, learn how Pennsylvania signers John Morton, George Ross and Dr. Benjamin Rush helped shape American independence.

entry.title: Corps of Engineers seeks office lease proposals in Nashville area
entry.content: Corps of Engineers seeks office lease proposals in Nashville area

entry.title: Build Freedom Initiative Launches With Big Contract to Skilled Trades Champion
entry.content: Michael Duffey, undersecretary of war for acquisition and sustainment, and Michael Cadnenazzi, assistant secretary of war for industrial base policy, presented television host Mike Rowe with a $10 million check at the Pentagon to formally launch the Build Freedom Initiative.

entry.title: Pennsylvania Army National Guard Conducts 'Ghillie Wash' Training Event
entry.content: Pennsylvania National Guard soldiers participated in a ghillie wash training exercise at Fort Indiantown Gap, Pa., in which they were put through intense physical training in ghillie suits, a garment designed to resemble heavy foliage, grass or terrain.

entry.title: News > News Releases > Display
entry.content: News > News Releases > Display

entry.title: Images - Tag Valiant Shield
entry.content: Images - Tag Valiant Shield

entry.title: Vietnam Veteran Receives Purple Heart 57 Years Later
entry.content: After 57 years, a Vietnam veteran received his long-overdue recognition thanks to a dedicated Army Reserve officer.

entry.title: Hegseth Thanks National Guard for D.C. Mission Ahead of Nation's 250th
entry.content: Secretary of War Pete Hegseth praised National Guardsmen in Washington for reducing city crime ahead of America's 250th birthday celebration.

entry.title: DOW Launches BuildFreedom.US, Announces $10M Skilled Trades Investment With Mike Rowe and Forge the Next-Generation Industrial Workforce
entry.content: The War Department announced the launch of the Build Freedom workforce development initiative.

entry.title: Images - Page 4 - Tag custer division
entry.content: Images - Page 4 - Tag custer division

entry.title: FBI Increases Reward Ahead of Fifth Anniversary of Chrys Carvajal's Murder
entry.content: Nearly five years after 19-year-old Chrys Carvajal was gunned down in a senseless act of gang violence, the FBI is renewing its call for justice with an increased reward of up to $50,000 for information leading to the arrest and conviction of fugitive Joseph Matos.

entry.title: Joint Security Cooperation Group-Panama provides support for Venezuelan relief with Panamanian partners
entry.content: Joint Security Cooperation Group-Panama provides support for Venezuelan relief with Panamanian partners

entry.title: Tactical Sustainment Leaders
entry.content: Tactical Sustainment Leaders

entry.content: Images - Page 4 - Tag military intelligence readiness command

entry.title: Army transformation team gets early look at new Multi-Domain formation
entry.content: Army transformation team gets early look at new Multi-Domain formation

entry.title: 9th MSC Soldiers Fueling the Fight for Valiant Shield
entry.content: 9th MSC Soldiers Fueling the Fight for Valiant Shield

entry.title: GSA Rolls Out Red, White and Blue Displays Across Federal Buildings Nationwide
entry.content: GSA Rolls Out Red, White and Blue Displays Across Federal Buildings Nationwide

entry.title: Images - Page 29 - Tag Combat Ready
entry.content: Images - Page 29 - Tag Combat Ready

entry.title: Guardians of the Deep: An Inside Look at the Elite Submarine Protection Coast Guard Unit
entry.content: A specialized single-mission Coast Guard unit in Washington state is dedicated to providing strategic in-transit security escorts for Navy ballistic missile submarines as they transit U.S. territorial waterways until they slip silently beneath the waves.

entry.title: Images - Page 26 - Tag Combat Ready
entry.content: Images - Page 26 - Tag Combat Ready

entry.title: Sudden danger: the science and stakes of flash flood forecasting
entry.content: Sudden danger: the science and stakes of flash flood forecasting An aerial view of a valley town with streets and houses overcome by flood waters. (Image credit: Christian/stock.adobe.com) July 1, 2026 0 Off

entry.title: NOAA announces regional priorities to advance America-first seafood strategy
entry.content: NOAA announces regional priorities to advance America-first seafood strategy July 2, 2026 The United States is a global leader in fisheries excellence, and aligning foreign fisheries to American standards will increase opportunities for American fishermen and women. (Image credit: Shutterstock via NOAA Fisheries) Today, NOAA announced regional priorities to revitalize the U.S. seafood sector focused on reducing burdens on domestic fishing, increasing production, improving access, and enhancing e

entry.title: U.S. Military Supports Venezuela Earthquake Response
entry.content: U.S. service members are on the ground in Venezuela, delivering assistance where it is needed most following two devastating earthquakes June 24.

entry.title: Army Reserve Ambassador presents Purple Heart to Vietnam War veteran
entry.content: Army Reserve Ambassador presents Purple Heart to Vietnam War veteran

entry.title: U.S. Participates in Fifth Iteration of Chilean-Hosted Exercise
entry.content: Aircraft, crews and support personnel from across the Americas converged at Cerro Moreno Air Base in Antofagasta, Chile, for the kickoff of Exercise Resolute Sentinel - Salitre 2026.

entry.title: Corps of Engineers begins dredging and research operations in St. Joseph Harbor
entry.content: Corps of Engineers begins dredging and research operations in St. Joseph Harbor

entry.title: Department of War Establishes Direct Reporting Portfolio Manager for Unmanned Systems to Ensure American Drone Dominance
entry.content: The War Department announced the comprehensive consolidation of all Unmanned and Autonomous Systems under a newly established, direct-report position to the deputy secretary of war.

entry.title: Vietnam Vet receives his Purple Heart at the Pentagon after 57 Years
entry.content: Vietnam Vet receives his Purple Heart at the Pentagon after 57 Years

entry.title: Denver Medical Recruiting Company Goes ALL IN on Men’s Mental Health
entry.content: Denver Medical Recruiting Company Goes ALL IN on Men’s Mental Health

entry.title: 144th Army Band Hosts 3 Concerts to Celebrate Independence Day
entry.content: 144th Army Band Hosts 3 Concerts to Celebrate Independence Day

entry.content: CSM Tranberg

entry.title: Maj. Gen. Kent Lightner, Commanding General, 412th Theater Engineer Command

entry.title: Army medical logistics overhaul cuts supply wait times in half
entry.content: Army medical logistics overhaul cuts supply wait times in half

entry.title: Images - Page 3 - Tag goats
entry.content: Images - Page 3 - Tag goats

entry.title: Face of Defense: Airman Conquers 7 World Marathon Majors in Less Than a Year
entry.content: Air Force Col. Alfredo "Juny" Laboy became the first active-duty service member to complete all seven Abbott World Marathon Majors within a single calendar year, marking a rare endurance achievement across the global race series.

entry.title: Face of Defense: Airman Conquers 7 World Marathon Majors in 365 Days
entry.content: Air Force Col. Alfredo "Juny" Laboy became the first active-duty service member to complete all seven Abbott World Marathon Majors within a single calendar year, marking a rare endurance achievement across the global race series.

entry.title: Images - Page 8 - Tag ohio
entry.content: Images - Page 8 - Tag ohio

entry.title: Manage Vehicle Paperwork Proactively at USAG Italy
entry.content: Manage Vehicle Paperwork Proactively at USAG Italy

entry.title: Freedom250 Reflective Moments of America
entry.content: Freedom250 Reflective Moments of America

entry.title: HUBS: MINDFULNESS CLUB

entry.title: 9th Mission Support Command Soldiers fueling the fight for Valiant Shield

entry.title: HAWK project office coordinates global air defense upgrades at 31st annual review
entry.content: HAWK project office coordinates global air defense upgrades at 31st annual review

entry.title: JIATF 401 Leaders Visit Whiteman Air Force Base to Strengthen Counter-Drone Operations
entry.content: Joint Interagency Task Force 401 leaders visited Whiteman Air Force Base, Mo., to learn about the installation's counter-unmanned aerial systems operations and initiatives in advance of the upcoming directed energy pilot program.

entry.title: Sinking Exercise Demonstrates Capabilities of Joint Force
entry.content: U.S. Pacific Command joint forces, along with allied and partner forces, successfully carried out a live-fire sinking exercise during Valiant Shield 2026, targeting the decommissioned amphibious transport dock USS Juneau off the coast of Guam.

entry.title: ‘America's Premier Intelligence Brigade’ Welcomes New Leadership
entry.content: ‘America's Premier Intelligence Brigade’ Welcomes New Leadership

entry.title: Contract for $99.6M awarded for NOAA Ship Henry B. Bigelow technology upgrade, essential maintenance
entry.content: Contract for $99.6M awarded for NOAA Ship Henry B. Bigelow technology upgrade, essential maintenance July 1, 2026 The NOAA Ship Henry B. Bigelow sailing near its homeport in Newport, Rhode Island. (Image credit: Katherine McGinnis/NOAA OMAO) Download Image NOAA has awarded $99,637,544.00 to JAG Ketchikan, LLC. in Ketchikan, Alaska, to complete expanded upgrades and maintenance on NOAA Ship Henry B. Bigelow. Following the 2027 field season, the ship will undergo this work for a 14-month period. T

entry.title: 1-109th Infantry executes realistic live-fire training at Fort Drum
entry.content: 1-109th Infantry executes realistic live-fire training at Fort Drum

entry.title: Exercise Venom Forge Strengthens Partnerships, Boosts Combat Readiness
entry.content: An integration exercise designed to develop new tactics, techniques and procedures, combined support from five wings, seven groups and 17 squadrons across a multitude of operations and support at Creech Air Force Base, Nevada, June 17.

entry.title: Jason M. Benhart is the top civilian Inspector General in the Army National Guard.
entry.content: Jason M. Benhart is the top civilian Inspector General in the Army National Guard.

entry.title: Navy Tests Prototype Atmospheric Diving System
entry.content: Naval Undersea Warfare Center Division hosted the first open water test of the Deep Sea Expeditionary with No Decompression suit in Liberty Bay, Wash.

entry.title: Department of War Launches New Website to Help Industry Partners Navigate Section 805 Supply Chain Requirements
entry.content: The War Department launched a website to provide guidance and resources for industry partners on the implementation of Section 805 of the fiscal 2024 National Defense Authorization Act, which restricts future DOW procurement from entities on the Section 1260H list of Chinese military companies.

entry.title: Repair Work Continues on Dunkirk Breakwater
entry.content: Repair Work Continues on Dunkirk Breakwater

entry.title: Upstate New York Woman Arrested, Charged with Attempting to Provide Material Support to the Palestine Islamic Jihad
entry.content: Catherine Beth Washburn, 37, of Irondequoit, New York, was charged with attempting to provide material support and resources to the Palestine Islamic Jihad, also known as Al-Quds Brigades.

entry.title: NASA F-5s arrive at JBA for “Freedom 250”
entry.content: NASA F-5s arrive at JBA for “Freedom 250”

entry.title: NEWSCAST June 30, 2026: Hawaii Guard, Indonesia Mark 20 Years State Partnership & 25th Infantry Division Prepares for Lightning Surge 4
entry.content: NEWSCAST June 30, 2026: Hawaii Guard, Indonesia Mark 20 Years State Partnership & 25th Infantry Division Prepares for Lightning Surge 4

entry.title: GSA Announces Street Closures for Demolition Work in Downtown Savannah
entry.content: GSA Announces Street Closures for Demolition Work in Downtown Savannah

entry.title: GSA Sells Former Chet Holifield Federal Building in Southern California
entry.content: GSA Sells Former Chet Holifield Federal Building in Southern California

entry.title: USS Theodore Roosevelt Hosts International Helicopter Exchange
entry.content: The aircraft carrier USS Theodore Roosevelt hosted more than 45 international partners from eight countries during an international helicopter warfighter exchange at Joint Base Pearl Harbor-Hickam, Hawaii, as part of Exercise Rim of the Pacific.

entry.title: 181st Infantry Brigade plays key role in large Army Reserve exercise
entry.content: 181st Infantry Brigade plays key role in large Army Reserve exercise

entry.title: Coast Guard Interdicts Over $63 Million in Illicit Drugs
entry.content: The crew aboard the Coast Guard cutter Bear offloaded approximately 7,720 pounds of cocaine and 4,000 pounds of marijuana worth more than $63 million at Port Everglades, Fla.

entry.title: Small Creatures, Big Mission: Bugapalooza Connects Science to Military Readiness
entry.content: Nearly 400 visitors attended the National Museum of Health and Medicine's Bugapalooza to learn how insects affect health, support the environment and affect military readiness.

entry.title: 101 Critical Days of Summer
entry.content: 101 Critical Days of Summer

entry.title: Department of War Establishes New Defense Policy Board
entry.content: Secretary of War Pete Hegseth announced the appointment of members to the Defense Policy Board.

entry.title: Medal of Honor Monday: Army Pvt. Elden Harvey Johnson
entry.content: Army Pvt. Elden Harvey Johnson fought in the 1944 Italian Campaign of World War II as an infantryman and was posthumously awarded the Medal of Honor for his extraordinary heroism.

entry.title: Mast Climbing
entry.content: Mast Climbing

entry.title: How FBI Philadelphia Prepared to Secure the World Cup
entry.content: Since high-profile events demand elite-level security, the FBI Philadelphia Field Office is partnering with the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS), the Pennsylvania State Police (PSP), and the Philadelphia Police Department (PPD) to ensure a safe experience for all.

entry.title: Assistant Secretary of the Army for Civil Works and USACE Commanding General Visit Montgomery Locks and Dam
entry.content: Assistant Secretary of the Army for Civil Works and USACE Commanding General Visit Montgomery Locks and Dam

entry.title: Joint Task Force Southern Border Conducts Medevac in Arizona Mountains
entry.content: Service members assigned to Joint Task Force Southern Border conducted an aeromedical evacuation after receiving a request to assist a civilian who was experiencing a medical emergency in a remote mountainous area of Arizona.

entry.title: U.S. Army Corps of Engineers Buffalo District Welcomes New Commander
entry.content: U.S. Army Corps of Engineers Buffalo District Welcomes New Commander

entry.title: Pa. National Guard hosts Côte d’Ivoire Armed Forces at Fort Indiantown Gap
entry.content: Pa. National Guard hosts Côte d’Ivoire Armed Forces at Fort Indiantown Gap

entry.title: Army updates Chaplain Corps uniforms
entry.content: Army updates Chaplain Corps uniforms

entry.title: Southern Command Moves Quickly to Support Venezuela Earthquake Relief
entry.content: As directed by the War Department, U.S. Southern Command is working with the State Department to support U.S. government relief operations in Venezuela in response to devastating earthquakes.

entry.title: Sgt. Abbie Muterspaw
entry.content: Sgt. Abbie Muterspaw

entry.title: Army Reserve medic brings combat trauma experience to civilian fire service
entry.content: Army Reserve medic brings combat trauma experience to civilian fire service

entry.title: Signers of the Declaration of Independence: Pennsylvania, Part 1
entry.content: George Clymer, Benjamin Franklin and Robert Morris Jr. were three of nine men who represented Pennsylvania at the Second Continental Congress when the Declaration of Independence was adopted on July 4, 1776.

entry.title: MMOD-PA supports mission readiness at the gateway of military service
entry.content: MMOD-PA supports mission readiness at the gateway of military service

entry.title: Images - Tag Operation Sentinel Justice
entry.content: Images - Tag Operation Sentinel Justice

entry.title: Images - Tag Fuel Operations
entry.content: Images - Tag Fuel Operations

entry.title: Pa. National Guard, Côte d’Ivoire formalize State Partnership
entry.content: Pa. National Guard, Côte d’Ivoire formalize State Partnership

entry.title: Scammers Target Job Seekers
entry.content: The FBI and LinkedIn have partnered to present possible red flags one might see in an online job listing that could indicate the offer is actually a scam. Visit fbi.gov/scams to learn more.

entry.title: Images - Tag Manikin
entry.content: Images - Tag Manikin

entry.title: National Guard Leader Says Domestic Missions Improving Troop Readiness
entry.content: Domestic missions like the D.C. Safe and Beautiful Task Force are helping build troop readiness rather than detracting from it, Army Maj. Gen. Ronald Burkett II said during a media roundtable discussion.

entry.title: National Guard Says Domestic Missions Improving Troop Readiness
entry.content: Domestic missions like the D.C. Safe and Beautiful Task Force are helping build troop readiness rather than detracting from it, Army Maj. Gen. Ronald Burkett II said during a media roundtable discussion.

entry.title: Families of Vietnam War Missing Gather to Hear Updates, Share Stories
entry.content: War Department officials pledged to continue searching for the 1,565 service members still missing from the Vietnam War during a meeting with grieving families in Arlington, Va.

entry.title: Visitors Welcome International Tall Ships to Baltimore for Sail 250
entry.content: As tall ships from around the world arrived in Baltimore Harbor for Sail 250 Maryland and Airshow Baltimore, the event offered more than a display of maritime tradition — it became an opportunity to celebrate heritage, strengthen friendships and reflect on connections forged at sea.

entry.title: Army Reserve sustainment Soldiers execute real-world rail operations during Operation Sent
entry.content: Army Reserve sustainment Soldiers execute real-world rail operations during Operation Sent

entry.title: DOW Unleashes 'Agent Network' to Transform AI-Enabled Battle Management and Targeting
entry.content: The War Department launched "Agent Network," the second pace-setting project and key element of the department's new artificial intelligence acceleration strategy.

entry.title: Biological detection systems create safety for Army Reserve Soldiers
entry.content: Biological detection systems create safety for Army Reserve Soldiers

entry.title: Trump Accounts Lay Solid Financial Foundation for Military Children
entry.content: Thanks to newly available Trump Accounts, military families can lay the foundation to ensure each of their children has a head start on a retirement plan. The program opens for financial contributions July 4.

entry.title: National Guardsmen Bring Medical Expertise to Paraguay
entry.content: More than 20 National Guard medical professionals from six states shared their clinical experience with Paraguayan partners and offered care to locals during Exercise Amistad, which includes a Dominican Republic rotation this year.

entry.title: USVDIV-32 Advances Unmanned Operations With NATO During BALTOPS 2026
entry.content: Sailors assigned to the Unmanned Surface Vessel Division 32 are at the forefront of the Navy's fleet during Exercise Baltic Operation, delivering realistic counter-unmanned surface vessel training against unmanned vessels to NATO allies.

entry.title: Four-legged Soldiers, first-class care: Army Reserve vets race against clock in high-stakes battlefield training
entry.content: Four-legged Soldiers, first-class care: Army Reserve vets race against clock in high-stakes battlefield training

entry.title: Army Reserve sustainment Soldiers execute real-world rail operations during Operation Sentinel Justice
entry.content: Army Reserve sustainment Soldiers execute real-world rail operations during Operation Sentinel Justice

entry.title: Operation Sentinel Justice combines real-world medical support, training to strengthen AR-MEDCOM, MRTC readiness

entry.title: Department of War Launches Interactive Investment Intelligence Center Tracking Transformative Industrial Base Revitalization
entry.content: The War Department's Office of the Assistant Secretary of War for Industrial Base Policy announced the launch of an Investment Intelligence Center interactive public website.

entry.title: Photos - Page 20
entry.content: Photos - Page 20

entry.title: Compensation for Victims of OneCoin’s Cryptocurrency Investment Fraud
entry.content: The FBI is encouraging victims of the OneCoin international cryptocurrency investment scheme whose investments resulted in a net loss to apply for compensation through a special DOJ program before the June 30 deadline.

entry.title: Ribbon cutting event for new NOAA facility in North Charleston, South Carolina
entry.content: Ribbon cutting event for new NOAA facility in North Charleston, South Carolina June 25, 2026 Charleston’s waterfront now has a new, state-of-the-art floating pier . The new pier and facility will provide essential support to NOAA Ship Nancy Foster, NOAA Ship Ronald H. Brown, and NOAA Corps officers and civilian mariners who rely on safe, resilient waterfront infrastructure to execute scientific and operational missions. (Image credit: Alan Blackwell/NOAA) Download Image NOAA Marine and Aviation

entry.title: 30th Rimpac Kicks Off in Hawaii
entry.content: Rim of the Pacific, the world's premier international maritime exercise, marks its 30th iteration this year.
